overview: LSBFL (Life Should Be Free Lottery) is a web3 phygital lottery app where anyone can buy digital lottery tickets, watch animated live draws, and manage their collectible ticket wallet — with store maps and POS portals for physical sales. Elegant, aspirational, and international.
features: Animated live draw with spinning ball reveal and confetti celebrations
Collectible ticket wallet with flip-card gallery and gift-by-link
Narrative onboarding with country & currency selector
Home feed with Mega Jackpot hero and lottery card carousel
Digital ticket purchase with tarot-card preview and seal animation
Prize claim flow with payout options
Physical store map with golden pins and search
POS portal for cashiers with commissions dashboard
Community winner feed with collectible badges
Visual help center with FAQ accordion
Spanish primary language with English toggle
Gold glow + clover green + deep black aesthetic
